evals.prompt: Show me what to work on next in the agent-skills project
evals.expected_output: Agent invokes manifold next-leaves to surface the frontier of unsatisfied leaf nodes, reports which nodes are currently planned and unblocked.

evals.prompt: Run a spec audit on the manifold project
evals.expected_output: Agent invokes manifold spec_audit (or spec-audit CLI), surfaces revisions with missing or suspicious change_reason, and interprets results in terms of spec revision discipline.

evals.prompt: Does code match the spec on web? Run a drift report.
evals.expected_output: Agent invokes manifold drift_report (or drift-report CLI) with project_root/repo when needed, surfaces violated verdicts and unverified realizations — not revision hygiene (that is spec_audit).

evals.prompt: What is the current state of the manifold project — which goals are achieved and which are still planned?
evals.expected_output: Agent uses peek_project or list_targets to query node target_status values across the project, summarizes what is achieved vs. planned, optionally shows the satisfaction state at each layer.
Agent invokes list_cross_blocking_chain and/or next_leaves with cross-blocked exclusions, reporting which nodes are blocked by cross-project dependencies.

evals.prompt: Run drift report on manifold with repo at ai-foundry
evals.expected_output: Agent invokes drift_report (or drift-report CLI) on project manifold with project_root/--repo pointing at the ai-foundry checkout; interprets violated vs unverified (and errored/satisfied) buckets — not revision hygiene (that is spec_audit).

evals.prompt: We need to evolve the manifold spec toward multi-tenant support — propose a trajectory, show the impact preview, then accept the legs
evals.expected_output: Agent uses propose_trajectory (or trajectory propose CLI) with target brief + legs without mutating the graph, then peek_trajectory/show for impact preview (next_leaves_after), then accept_trajectory_leg — not ad-hoc update_node chains or next-leaves inside propose/show.
